title: Reach contact from the hero call to action
description: Visiting the homepage and using the hero contact call to action should take the visitor to the Instagram contact flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the hero call to action for booking a free call
Verify the Instagram contact destination is opened

title: Navigate to each key section from the top navigation
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the fixed navigation to jump between the homepage sections and reach the main content areas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the value proposition section
Verify the value proposition section is displayed
Click the navigation link for the process section
Verify the process section is displayed
Click the navigation link for the work section
Verify the work section is displayed
Click the navigation link for the pricing packages section
Verify the pricing packages section is displayed
Click the navigation link for the contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed

title: Open Instagram DM from the contact section
description: This verifies that a visitor can reach the contact section and use the primary Instagram DM call to action to open Instagram in a new tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Click the Instagram DM contact button
Verify Instagram opens in a new tab
Verify the contact action remains available on the page

title: Start contact from the hero call to action
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the hero call to action to open the Instagram DM contact path in a new tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call to action to book a free call
Verify a new browser tab or window is opened for Instagram

title: Use the fixed navigation to reach key sections
description: Visiting the homepage and using the fixed navigation should let a visitor jump between the main informational sections without losing the page context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the process section
Click the navigation link for the work section
Click the navigation link for the pricing section
Click the navigation link for the contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed

title: Open Instagram from the top navigation
description: This verifies that a visitor can reach the agency's Instagram profile from the navigation and that the external link opens separately.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Instagram link in the top navigation
Verify a new browser tab or window is opened for Instagram

title: Send a desktop contact message
description: This verifies that a desktop visitor can complete the contact form and see a confirmation message after submitting.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the Instagram handle or email field with a valid contact value
Fill in the message field with a brief inquiry
Submit the contact form
Verify a confirmation message is visible
Verify the contact form is no longer in its initial state

title: Use the mobile menu to jump to a section and close the drawer
description: This verifies that a mobile visitor can open the hamburger menu, navigate to a section, and have the menu close after selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the browser to a mobile viewport
Open the mobile navigation menu
Select the work section link in the mobile menu
Verify the work section is displayed
Verify the mobile navigation menu is closed

title: Jump from a package to contact
description: Visiting the homepage and using a package call to action should scroll the page to the contact section so the visitor can continue to inquiry.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the pricing section
Click a package call to action
Verify the contact section is displayed

title: Open the Instagram link from the footer
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the footer Instagram link to open the agency profile in a new tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the Instagram footer link
Verify Instagram opens in a new tab
Verify the footer remains visible on the page

title: Open the email link from the footer
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the footer email link to open the email client from the homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the email footer link
Verify the email client opens
Verify the footer contact options are still available

title: Review the pricing packages and choose a contact path
description: This verifies that a visitor can compare the pricing packages and use a package call to action to reach the contact section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the pricing packages section
Click the call to action for a pricing package
Verify the contact section is displayed

title: Review the pricing tiers
description: Visiting the homepage and scrolling to the pricing section should display the Starter, Pro, and Custom packages for comparison.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the pricing section
Verify the three pricing packages are displayed

title: Reach the contact section from pricing packages
description: This verifies that a visitor can use a pricing package call to action to jump to the contact section and continue the inquiry flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the pricing packages section
Click a package call to action
Verify the contact section is displayed
Verify a contact path is available

title: Jump from the hero to the work showcase
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the hero call to action to jump directly to the work showcase section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call to action to see the work showcase
Verify the work section is displayed

title: Send a desktop contact message and see confirmation
description: This verifies that a desktop visitor can complete the contact form and see the success state after submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the message field with a brief inquiry
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Stay focused on Instagram DM as the mobile contact option
description: This verifies that a mobile visitor can reach the contact section and use the Instagram DM action when the desktop form is hidden.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set the viewport to a mobile size
Scroll to the contact section
Verify the contact form is not displayed
Verify the Instagram DM contact button is displayed

title: View the process timeline
description: Visiting the homepage and scrolling to the process section should reveal the full four-step timeline for how the agency works.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the process section
Verify the four-step process timeline is displayed

title: Review the value proposition cards on the homepage
description: This verifies that a visitor can scroll to the value proposition section and see the three supporting benefit cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the value proposition section
Verify the value proposition cards are displayed

title: View the featured project showcase
description: Visiting the homepage and scrolling to the work section should reveal the featured project image and supporting project copy.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the work section
Verify the featured project showcase is displayed

title: Use the hero work showcase call to action
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the work showcase from the hero area and see the featured project content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the hero work showcase call to action
Verify the work section is displayed
Verify featured project content is visible

title: Keep the featured project visible in the work showcase
description: This verifies that a visitor can inspect the featured project area in the work showcase and see the project presentation content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call to action to see the work showcase
Verify the featured project content is displayed

title: Review the agency value proposition from the homepage sections
description: This verifies that a visitor can understand the agency offer by browsing the core homepage sections in sequence.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the problem and value proposition section
Scroll to the process section
Scroll to the work section
Scroll to the pricing packages section
Verify the core informational sections are displayed
Verify the homepage presents a clear path to contact

title: Use Instagram contact from the contact section on mobile
description: This verifies that a mobile visitor can still reach the agency through Instagram when the contact form is hidden.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the browser to a mobile viewport
Scroll to the contact section
Verify the contact form is not displayed
Click the Instagram contact link
Verify a new browser tab or window is opened for Instagram

title: See the hover lift on a value proposition card
description: This verifies that a visitor gets the expected hover interaction on the value proposition cards while browsing on desktop.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the value proposition section
Hover over a value proposition card
Verify the hovered card shows a lifted interactive state

title: See process steps animate into view
description: Visiting the homepage and scrolling to the process section should reveal the process steps with their staggered entrance behavior.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the process section
Verify the process steps are displayed
Verify the process section appears after scrolling

title: Keep the contact form from submitting with empty fields
description: This verifies that the contact form blocks an empty submission and shows validation feedback instead of a success state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Submit the contact form without entering details
Verify a form validation error is visible

title: See the project image zoom interaction
description: Visiting the homepage and hovering the featured project image should preserve the showcase while applying the expected visual zoom effect.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the work section
Hover over the featured project image
Verify the featured project showcase remains visible

title: Hover a process step
description: Visiting the homepage and hovering a process step should apply the expected lift interaction without disrupting the timeline content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the process section
Hover over a process step
Verify the process timeline remains visible
